title: Fix Admin Login, Update Cover Tagline, and Replace Instagram QR Code

requirements.text: Fix the Admin Panel login flow in AdminLogin.tsx. The login button currently gets stuck in 'Initializing...' state and shows 'Please complete authentication in the popup...' without proceeding. The login should validate the hardcoded credentials and then trigger Internet Identity authentication cleanly, allowing the admin to successfully reach the Admin Panel. Ensure the button state resets properly if authentication fails or is cancelled.

quotes: This is current issues in Admin pannel login

acceptanceCriteria: The login button does not remain stuck in 'Initializing...' indefinitely after credentials are entered
After entering valid credentials, the Internet Identity popup opens and completes successfully
If authentication is cancelled or fails, the button returns to its normal clickable state
Admin is redirected to the Admin Panel upon successful login

requirements.text: Update the hero/cover page tagline in HeroSection.tsx to read 'Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.' replacing the current tagline text.

quotes: Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.
Use this line on cover page

acceptanceCriteria: The cover/hero section displays the text 'Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.'
No other hero content is altered

requirements.text: Replace the dynamically generated QR code in QRSection.tsx with a static image of the official @KHUDRANGKALAKAAR Instagram QR code (the orange/pink gradient QR code with the Instagram logo in the center and '@KHUDRANGKALAKAAR' label, as provided in the uploaded second image). Display this static image asset instead of the programmatically generated QR code.

quotes: Use the qr code in second image for insta

acceptanceCriteria: The QR section displays the official Instagram QR code image (orange/pink gradient with Instagram logo centre)
The '@KHUDRANGKALAKAAR' label is visible below the QR code
The image is served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated
The dynamically generated QR code is no longer rendered

constraints: Do not change any other text content on the cover/hero page beyond the tagline
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not alter the backend admin credentials or role assignment logic
nonGoals: Changing the Instagram profile URL or WhatsApp link
Updating any other section content beyond the hero tagline and QR code

required: Orange-to-pink gradient dot-style Instagram QR code with Instagram camera logo in centre and '@KHUDRANGKALAKAAR' label in bold pink text at the bottom (instagram-qr-khudrangkalakaar.dim_600x650.png)
